div.class: flex justify-between items-center w-full px-margin-mobile md:px-8 max-w-max-width mx-auto h-16

a.t-attf-class: text-sm font-medium transition-colors {{ 'text-primary border-b-2 border-primary pb-1 font-bold' if request.httprequest.path in ['/', '/catalog'] else 'text-on-surface-variant hover:text-primary' }}
text-sm font-medium transition-colors {{ 'text-primary border-b-2 border-primary pb-1 font-bold' if request.httprequest.path == '/my-rentals' else 'text-on-surface-variant hover:text-primary' }}

button.class: relative text-on-surface-variant hover:text-primary transition-colors p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-surface-variant

span.class: absolute top-1 right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-[#D97706] text-white text-[9px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-bold

button.class: relative text-on-surface-variant hover:text-primary transition-colors p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-surface-variant

span.class: absolute top-1 right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-primary text-on-primary text-[9px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-bold

button.class: flex items-center gap-2 p-1 rounded-full hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors

div.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-outline-variant bg-primary flex items-center justify-center
hidden absolute right-0 top-12 w-72 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-outline-variant/30 z-50 overflow-hidden animate-fade-in
p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-transparent border-b border-outline-variant/20

a.class: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant rounded-lg transition-colors
flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors
bg-primary text-on-primary px-5 py-2 rounded text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors shadow-sm

div.class: flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center w-full px-margin-mobile md:px-8 max-w-max-width mx-auto py-8 gap-6 md:gap-0
div.div: © 2024 BukuRumah Modern Library. All rights reserved.

odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
            

                
                
                BukuRumah — Modern Library
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                    tailwind.config = {
                        darkMode: "class",
                        theme: {
                            extend: {
                                colors: {
                                    "primary": "#012425",
                                    "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                                    "primary-container": "#1a3a3a",
                                    "on-primary-container": "#83a4a3",
                                    "surface": "#f8f9fa",
                                    "on-surface": "#191c1d",
                                    "surface-variant": "#e1e3e4",
                                    "on-surface-variant": "#414848",
                                    "outline": "#717878",
                                    "outline-variant": "#c1c8c7",
                                    "background": "#f8f9fa",
                                    "on-background": "#191c1d",
                                    "surface-container": "#edeeef",
                                    "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                                    "surface-container-highest": "#e1e3e4",
                                    "accent": "#D97706",
                                    "accent-hover": "#B45309",
                                },
                                spacing: {
                                    "margin-mobile": "16px",
                                    "max-width": "1280px",
                                    "margin-desktop": "auto",
                                    "xl": "64px",
                                    "lg": "40px",
                                    "md": "24px",
                                    "gutter": "24px",
                                },
                                fontFamily: {
                                    "headline-md": ["Playfair Display", "serif"],
                                    "headline-lg": ["Playfair Display", "serif"],
                                    "display": ["Playfair Display", "serif"],
                                    "label-sm": ["Inter", "sans-serif"],
                                    "body-md": ["Inter", "sans-serif"],
                                    "label-md": ["Inter", "sans-serif"],
                                    "body-sm": ["Inter", "sans-serif"],
                                    "body-lg": ["Inter", "sans-serif"],
                                },
                                animation: {
                                    "fade-in": "fadeIn 0.2s ease-out",
                                    "slide-up": "slideUp 0.3s ease-out",
                                },
                                keyframes: {
                                    fadeIn: { "0%": { opacity: "0" }, "100%": { opacity: "1" } },
                                    slideUp: { "0%": { opacity: "0", transform: "translateY(10px)" }, "100%": { opacity: "1", transform: "translateY(0)" } },
                                },
                            }
                        }
                    }
                
                
            
            
                
                

                
                
                    
                

                
                

                
                

                
                

                    

                        

                            local_mall Your Cart
                        
                        
                            close
                        
                    

                    
                        
                        

                            
                                

                                    

                                        
                                    
                                    

                                        

                                            

                                                

                                                
                                                    
                                                    
                                                    close
                                                
                                            
                                            

                                        
                                        

                                            
                                            Rp 
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                                

                                    shopping_basket
                                    
Your cart is empty
                                
                            
                        

                        
                            

                                

                                    Subtotal ( items)
                                    Rp 
                                
                                
                                    Proceed to Checkout
                                    arrow_forward
                                
                            
                        
                    
                

                
                
                    function toggleCart() {
                        const overlay = document.getElementById('cartOverlay');
                        const drawer = document.getElementById('cartDrawer');
                        if (drawer.classList.contains('translate-x-0')) {
                            drawer.classList.remove('translate-x-0');
                            drawer.classList.add('translate-x-full');
                            overlay.classList.add('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
                            overlay.classList.remove('opacity-100');
                        } else {
                            drawer.classList.remove('translate-x-full');
                            drawer.classList.add('translate-x-0');
                            overlay.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
                            overlay.classList.add('opacity-100');
                        }
                    }

                    function toggleProfile() {
                        const dd = document.getElementById('profileDropdown');
                        dd.classList.toggle('hidden');
                    }

                    // Close profile dropdown on outside click
                    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        const popover = document.getElementById('profilePopover');
                        const dd = document.getElementById('profileDropdown');
                        if (popover && dd && !popover.contains(e.target)) {
                            dd.classList.add('hidden');
                        }
                    });

                    // Format Rupiah helper
                    function formatRp(num) {
                        return 'Rp ' + new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(num);
                    }

section.class: mb-10 text-center md:text-left flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-transparent rounded-2xl p-8 md:p-12

div.p: Explore a curated collection of physical literature. Rent a classic, buy a new release — all at BukuRumah.

div.class: hidden md:block w-64 h-48 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 mb-8 items-stretch md:items-center

span.class: material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-outline text-[20px]

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by title, author, or ISBN...
input.class: w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-outline-variant bg-white text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-colors

button.class: bg-primary text-on-primary px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors

select.class: bg-white border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-on-surface focus:border-primary outline-none cursor-pointer
bg-white border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-on-surface focus:border-primary outline-none cursor-pointer

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8

article.class: warm-paper rounded-xl soft-shadow overflow-hidden flex flex-col hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 border border-transparent hover:border-outline-variant/30 h-full

div.class: relative aspect-[3/4] bg-surface-container flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden

img.class: w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300

div.class: absolute top-2 left-2 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-sm

h3.class: font-headline-md text-primary text-base leading-snug mb-1 line-clamp-2 group-hover:underline

span.class: px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase
px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-accent/10 text-accent rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase

div.p: No books found matching your criteria.

a.class: px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors text-on-surface-variant

a.t-attf-class: px-3 py-1.5 rounded transition-colors {{ 'bg-primary text-on-primary font-bold' if p == page else 'border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant text-on-surface-variant' }}

a.class: px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors text-on-surface-variant
